CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Gets the instruction set from the connected instrument.
Deletes the instruction set from the connected instrument.
Renews the lease with the connected instrument.
Drops the lease with the connected instrument.
Gets the Firmware version of the connected instrument.
Sets the new MAC address for the connected instrument.
Disconnects the specified client socket connection.
Resets the Ethernet module.
Requests beacon information from the connected instrument.
Requests the connected instrument for Admin privileges. NOTE: Application with admin privileges can execute any command on the instrument.
Gets the last response sent from the instrument.
Sets the status rate of the instrument to the specified interval.
Gets all the clients information connected to the instrument.
Sets the non-volatile memory value for the specified address.
Gets the non-volatile memory value for the specified address.
Get the status of the XYZ Motor, X Position, Y Position, Z Position, Error description if any.

ReturnParameter.ParameterNotes: XYZ Motor status ('E' for Error, ‘R’ for Running (or homing), ‘U’ for Unpowered (also Unhomed), ‘P’ for Parked)
Z Position base on z-arm used

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Turns output contacts on/off.
Turns output contact-1 on/off.
Turns output contact-2 on/off
Legacy.
Clears error code.
Reads external power contacts status.
Reads relay output & external power status
Gets error code. See user document for possible error codes.
Returns On/Off status of Diverter
Gets status of input contacts.
Gets XYZ Motor status. ‘E’ for Error, ‘R’ for Running (or homing), ‘U’ for Unpowered (also Unhomed), ‘P’ for Parked.
Gets relay output contacts status(On/Off)
Gets state of solenoid contacts.
Gets X & Y positions. X position ranges from 0-389. Y position ranges from 0-294.
Gets Z-position.
Homes XYZ. Moves Z to the top of travel. XY to the park position. Any error state is cleared before homing starts.
The PROM instrument name and version
Legacy
Sets the new X position.
Sets the new X Position with the specified speed.

CommandDefinition.CommandName: Move X with Speed and Current
CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Moves to new X-axis position with the specified speed & Drive level
Sets the new X & Y position.
Set the new X & Y position with the specified speeds

CommandDefinition.CommandName: Move XY with Speed and Current
CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Sets the new X & Y position with the specified speed and drive level.
Set the new Y position.
Set the new Y position with the specified speed.

CommandDefinition.CommandName: Move Y with Speed and Current
CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Set the new Y position with the specified speed and drive level.
Sets the new Z position.
Sets the new Z position with the specified speed.

Sets the new Z position with Liquid Level Detection. If liquid is encountered (on a downward movement) or air is encountered (on an upward movement) the movement stops immediately. If the position is the same as the target specified it may be assumed that liquid (or air) was not encountered

Parameter.ParameterNotes: Range is based on the Z-Arm used.

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Set the relay output contacts to On/Off
Sets the relay output contact-1 to On/Off.
Sets the relay output contact to On/Off.
Sets the specified relay output contact for pulse time specified. For example values 1 and 0.5 sets the relay contact 1 to be closed for 0.5 seconds.
Sets the state of the solenoid outputs.
Sets the state of the Solenoid output 1
Sets the state of the solenoid output 2
Wait for X-Motor to come to parked position.
Wait until X & Y Motors to come to parked position.
Wait for Y-Motor to come to parked position.
Wait for Z-Motor to come to parked position.
Flip valve to position specified and then aspirate specified volume with the specified flow rate.

Parameter.ParameterNotes: Flow rate in ml/min at which to aspirate

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Legacy.
Clears error code.
Flip valve to position and dispense the volume specified.

Parameter.ParameterNotes: Flow rate in ml/min at which to dispense

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Gets error code. See user document for possible error codes.
Gets motor status
Gets the Valve position of the syringe and the Volume of the syringe contents. Default unit for volume is µL.

ReturnParameter.ParameterNotes: Valve position can be 'R' for Reservoir, ‘N’ for Needle, ‘O’ for valve motor overload, ‘X’ for running
Volume can be to 0.1 µl resolution, depending on syringe

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Halt the syringe and generate error.
Homes GX Solvent system selection valve to waste position. The held volume is set to zero but no pumping occurs.
The PROM instrument name and version.
Legacy.
Sets the valve position.
Wait for syringe motor to get into parked position.
Legacy.
Clears error code.
Gets error code. See user document for possible error codes.
Get the status of the valve.

ReturnParameter.ParameterNotes: Will be one of these values. 'R' for Moving, 'L' for Load position, 'I' for Inject position.

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Gets the valve position. 'R' for Moving, ' L' for Load position, 'I' for Inject position.
The PROM instrument name and version.
Legacy.
Turns valve to injection position.
Turns valve to load position.
Moves the valve to specified position. 'L' for Load position, 'I' for Inject position.
Wait for valve motor to come to load position.
Flip valve to position specified and then aspirate with the specified flow rate.

Parameter.ParameterNotes: 'N' for needle or 'R' for reservoir position.
Flow Rate at which to aspirate in ml/min

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Legacy.
Clears error code.
Flip valve to specified position and then dispense at specified flow rate.

Parameter.ParameterNotes: 'N' for needle or 'R' for reservoir position.
Flow rate at which to dispense in ml/min.

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Gets error code. See user document for possible error codes.
Gets the status of the syringe.

ReturnParameter.ParameterNotes: Will be one of these values. 'U for unpowered, 'P' for parked, 'R' for running, 'E' for Error, ‘X’ for missing.

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Gets current pressure value with 2 decimal places.
Gets the valve position and Syringe contents volume in µL or '?' if unknown (Homed).

ReturnParameter.ParameterNotes: N, R, or G for 3 position valve, N or R for 2 position valve, T if configured for a ‘tee’, X for missing, E if an invalid configuration

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Syringe operation is halted.
Initialized Valve & Syringe. NOTE: Some liquid will typically come from the probe during initializing, so ensure that the probes are in a suitable location before initializing.
The PROM instrument name and version
Legacy
Legacy
Gets the valve position of the pump. N, R, or G for 3 position valve, N or R for 2 position valve, T if configured for a ‘tee’, X for missing, E if an invalid configuration
Wait for syringe to complete the current operation.
